_publications._publicationTitle: A High-Throughput Screening Platform Identifies Novel Combination Treatments for Malignant Peripheral Nerve Sheath Tumors
_publications._context: and in an NF1-PDOX model (MPNST-NF1-09; fourfold)

basicInfo.description: NF1-associated MPNST patient-derived orthotopic xenograft (PDOX) maintained in athymic nude mice; used in high-throughput drug combination screening
